ocr_findings.description: Mascot/illustration images (dog character icons beside section headings) are replaced by image placeholders — expected for decorative graphics.
The sidebar label '序章' (vertical right-margin chapter label) is absent from OCR.

reviewer_notes: Lesson 00-03 page on effective study methods, covering re-reading strategy, pre-sleep review, and past-exam practice. All substantive text including URLs and section headings ('頻出の過去問を解く', '過去問を解くことの大切さ') is faithfully captured. Minor omissions are purely decorative.
